hypothesis:
Given that this paper demonstrates the effectiveness of ML-guided metal lattice screening for discovering metal superhydrides with 3D hydrogen clathrate structures, and that 19 of 31 newly identified superhydrides exhibit Tc > 100 K, a logical extension would be:

**Hypothesis:** Ternary metal superhydrides (M₁ₓM₂ᵧHᵧ) constructed by co-doping two metals with distinct electronic configurations into high-template-strength metal lattices will exhibit enhanced superconducting transition temperatures (Tc > 200 K) compared to their binary counterparts due to synergistic effects on hydrogen cage stability and electronic density of states at the Fermi level.
